50.2 Acres in Costilla County, Colorado

Price: $89,500

Acreage: 50.2 acres

Location: Blanca, San Luis Valley, Costilla County, CO

Description

Beautiful high-desert parcel with panoramic views of the Sangre de Cristo Mountains and the San Luis Valley. Off-grid potential with year-round road access. Borders BLM land on two sides.

Features

  • Mountain views
  • Year-round road access
  • Off-grid ready (solar viable)
  • Adjacent BLM land for hiking and recreation
  • Mineral rights included

Utilities

No utilities currently on parcel. Power lines run along nearby county road. Well permit available through Colorado Division of Water Resources.
